title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class AI model with advanced capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, and analytics. Anthropic implemented safety systems to restrict its capabilities in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology, introducing capability limitation as a deployment practice for frontier models.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as a Mythos-class model with capabilities spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, and analytics. It explains that Anthropic paired the launch with safety systems that restrict the model's performance in high-risk domains such as cybersecurity and biology. The notable takeaway is capability limitation as a deployment practice for frontier models, where a vendor deliberately constrains what a model can do in sensitive areas rather than shipping its full range.
